**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Quanzhou Lianyou Machinery Co., Ltd. is a deeply established (1990) physical manufacturing enterprise specializing in heavy construction machinery components, completely misclassified by the registry as an 'Auto Body/Trailer Manufacturer'. Originating as 'Quanzhou Jiangnan Lianyou Machinery Factory' (recovered from a severe data column shift), it maintains a solid paid-in capital of 3.8M RMB and an active workforce of 52 insured employees (also recovered from shifted data). Its true core competency, revealed in its business scope and supported by its active corporate domain ('lymachine.cn'), is the production and sale of track shoes ('履带板') and other mechanical parts. This explicitly identifies them as a Tier-2/Tier-3 supplier of undercarriage components for excavators, bulldozers, and crawler cranes, a staple industry in the Quanzhou manufacturing belt.
